steps.title: Find the remaining angle
steps.content:
In right triangle $PQR$, the right angle measures $90^\circ$ and angle $Q$ measures $18^\circ$. The third angle is
$$P=180^\circ-90^\circ-18^\circ=72^\circ$$

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content:
The triangles are similar and $P$ corresponds to $S$, so the angles have equal measures.
$$S=P=72^\circ$$
The answer is B.
